series_metadata.series_title: Motion, Entry, and Certification for App
series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-7 (019-0007), FIS-8 (019-0008), and FIS-9 (019-0009). This form prescribed by the State Public Defender (OPD-1026R) and the companion Continuation Sheet (OPD-1027R) is used to document indigent defense counsel appointments, hours, and expens

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: current fiscal year next most recent fiscal year . Remove older records off-site storage two years
